overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through an abandoned, sand-covered urban district on the outskirts of Night City. The scene features futuristic decaying architecture, a hovering aerial vehicle, and prominent spherical and bowl-shaped buildings under a bright desert sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned construction site beneath overhead metal walkway

events.description: exits shadow of overhead bridge into direct bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through sandy construction area beneath metal scaffolding and walkways

entered.detail: large orange and black futuristic construction truck with crane arm
rusted metal pedestrian bridge with yellow and black hazard stripes overhead
yellow industrial scaffolding attached to concrete building facade
stacked concrete blocks and barbed wire fencing

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a dusty construction site with a large vehicle and scaffolding. The camera walks forward beneath a metal walkway bridge, exiting its shadow into bright sunlight by the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned desert street with futuristic skyline

events.description: flying AV vehicle appears hovering in the sky ahead
camera turns slightly left while continuing forward toward spherical building

agents.ego_description: traversing open sandy street toward the distant spherical building

entered.detail: dark hovering aerial vehicle with red lights floating above the street
large metallic spherical structure dominating the distant skyline
derelict futuristic vehicles partially buried in sand
curved modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide desert street with abandoned cars and a hovering AV in the sky. The camera moves steadily toward a prominent spherical building while passing from shadow into full sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to large bowl-shaped amphitheater structure

events.description: scattered pedestrians appear walking in the distance ahead
approaching the graffiti-covered bowl structure entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the large bowl structure while passing scattered pedestrians and abandoned vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward camera on the left side of path

entered.detail: massive concrete amphitheater-like structure with weathered panels and graffiti
low-rise structure with green tinted windows and neon accents
concrete staircase with ramp leading up alongside the bowl structure

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the sandy wasteland toward a massive bowl-shaped structure covered in graffiti. Several pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the camera approaches the entrance stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending ramp beside the bowl structure

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs alongside the bowl structure
reaches top of stairs revealing upper plaza with red paving tiles

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs next to the graffiti-covered bowl structure toward the upper level

entered.detail: red and black industrial oil pumpjack operating on the hillside
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint and tags

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the concrete stairs beside the bowl structure, revealing graffiti-covered walls. Upon reaching the top, the view opens to an upper plaza with red paving tiles and a prominent oil pumpjack visible against the spherical building backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with red paving and spherical building view

events.description: passing by distinctive yellow circular building on the right

agents.ego_description: walking across the upper plaza toward the spherical building with the yellow structure on the right

notable_agents.action: person in orange outfit walking ahead of camera toward the plaza center

entered.detail: circular yellow building with multiple levels and metal railings on roof
open area with red concrete tiles and scattered debris
large desert rock outcroppings behind the buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera traversing the red-tiled upper plaza with a distinctive yellow cylindrical building on the right. The spherical building remains visible in the distance while the character walks past scattered pedestrians and abandoned vehicles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed construction site through a desolate desert street and up into an elevated urban plaza. It begins by walking beneath a metal walkway bridge at a dusty site with scaffolding, exiting the shade into the blinding glare of a bright desert sun. As the camera moves forward into a wide sandy wasteland, it passes abandoned cars and a hovering AV in the sky while advancing toward a prominent spherical building. The scene then shifts toward a massive, graffiti-covered bowl-shaped structure, where the camera ascends concrete stairs past oncoming pedestrians to reach an upper plaza with red paving tiles. Finally, the view opens across this elevated area, passing a yellow cylindrical building and scattered vehicles with an oil pumpjack and the distant spherical architecture framing the horizon.
